name: FrootAI
description: The open glue for the GenAI ecosystem — 45 MCP tools, 104 solution plays, 860+ AI primitives (238 agents, 176 instructions, 333 skills, 10 hooks, 77 plugins) via the FAI Protocol. From the Roots to the Fruits.
features: 104 production-ready AI solution plays (Enterprise RAG, Multi-Agent, Voice AI, Edge AI, Agentic RAG, Browser Agent, and 98 more)
860+ AI primitives — 238 agents, 176 instructions, 333 skills, 10 hooks, 77 plugins
FAI Protocol v2.0 — context-wiring with 10 moonshot contract types
45-tool MCP server (knowledge, live, agent-chain, ecosystem, engine, scaffold, marketplace)
VS Code extension with FAI Engine, DevKit/TuneKit/SpecKit scaffolding
16 FROOT knowledge modules covering AI architecture end-to-end
Infrastructure as Code — Bicep + Terraform for every Azure play
6 distribution channels — npm, PyPI, VS Code, Docker, GitHub Actions, CLI
